title: Onest Schooled - School Management System Laravel Script
description: Onest Schooled is a powerful and feature-rich school management system that is built using the Laravel 9 framework. It offers a wide range of features including online admission, student info, academic, fees, examination, transaction, attendance, report, language, staff manage, subscription, contact message, website setup, gallery, library and settings integration. With Onest Schooled , users can easily apply online admission and show reports. The system supports multiple language. Overall, Onest Schooled is an excellent choice for individuals and organizations looking for a comprehensive school management system that is packed with features and easy to use.
tags: Laravel, School-Management, PHP, Education, Database, Web-Application, Admin-Panel, Open-Source, Responsive, User-Management

title: Onest LMS - Online Learning Management System Web Application
description: Onest LMS- Online Learning Management System web application(LMS) Template crafted specifically for Online courses, University, College, School, LMS course, Training center, or any type of educational institution. It is meticulously developed using cutting-edge technologies like Laravel, MySQL, Bootstrap, HTML5, CSS3, and jQuery. This template offers a responsive and pristine design that ensures optimal user experience. It is exceptionally effortless to personalize, thanks to its comprehensive and well-crafted documentation. We have included extensive documentation to cater to your technologies adequately. Also, users have the option to seamlessly switch to a Dark mode, which aids in mitigating eye strain, especially during extended periods of screen time. The blog section boasts a diverse range of articles encompassing various subjects, including courses, universities, technology, and RTL/LRT compatibility, among others.
tags: Online-Learning, Web-Application, Learning-Management, Educational-Technology, User-Interface, User-Experience, Web-Development, E-Learning, Responsive-Design, Educational-Content
